title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Shoes - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Shoes - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!
